EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT PATINO, JESUS SANTOS
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. PURSUANT TO THE SEP18-17 COURT ORDER THE MATTER WAS CONTINUED FOR THE JUDGMENT CREDIOR TO CASH THE $2000.00 CHECK THAT WAS GIVEN TO HIM IN OPEN COURT BY THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. THE $2000.00 WAS THE REAMINING BALANCE DUE ON THE JUDGMENT. IF THE CHECK CLEARED AND NEITHER PARTY APPEARED THE MATTER WOULD BE DISCHARGED AND THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT CREDITOR ADRIAN CRUZ IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR JESUS PATINO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED DEC-06-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PATINO, JESUS SANTOS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER KENNETH WRIGHT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2017 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF CRUZ, ADRIAN ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2017 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO SEP-21-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR GAVE THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR A CHECK FOR $2000.00 WHICH IS THE REMAINING BALANCE DUE. IF THE CHECK CLEARS NEITHER PARTY IS REQUIRED TO APPEAR AND THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. IF THE CHECK DOES NOT CLEAR BOTH PARTIES ARE REQURIED TO APEAR. JUDGMENT CREDITOR ADRIAN CRUZ IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR JESUS PATINO IS PRESENT. BOTH PARTIES ARE ASSIED BY DANIEL NAVARRO, CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION. DISCHARGED AS SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
